The launch and settigs json files are for configuration in vscode with Windows.
It is for including JavaFX with version 17.0.18 (older version). 
These files should be ignored, removed, edited if it is not the version currently used. 

The folder for the jar files for JavaFX should be placed in the C:\ folder.

Links:
For installation of JavaFX:
"https://gluonhq.com/products/javafx/"

For configuring JavaFX for vscode (Windows): 
"https://medium.com/@Satyam_Mishra/getting-started-with-javafx-in-vscode-beginner-way-9fed580fd4f"
